value.found_quote: **Permissions system**: Every tool and bash command can be configured to allow, block, or prompt the user for approval. Use glob patterns to create rules like "allow all npm commands" or "block any command with sudo". Organizations can set policies that apply across all users. See [permissions](/en/permissions).
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes the Permissions system under "Built-in security features," matching the claim almost verbatim: tools and bash commands can be configured to allow, block, or prompt for approval, glob patterns are supported, and org-wide policies are mentioned. The page presents this as a current, active feature.
